name: San Francisco Zoo
summary_en: The archive record documents the zoo's capital planning and oversight — master-plan environmental impact reports (1997-1998) and a 1995 infrastructure master plan, a 2000 Budget Analyst performance audit, and a 2003 Zoo Audit Select Committee agenda. Recreation and Park Commission minutes record animal donations, a rehabilitation contract, and a reported $2,000,000 improvement project (1977), while earlier records use the historic name Fleishhacker Zoo (a 1929 municipal record and a 1965 annual report). The zoo is operated by the Recreation and Park Department, whose FY2025 budget line is about $250M. No contract in the data names it.
